g.text: Caddy gateway — load-balances WebSockets · sticky cookie sessions · serves the SPA
• Socket.IO adapter — pub/sub fan-out across replicas
• Presence store — who is in each room + last position
Kill / restart / upgrade any of them —
re-sync. A TTL sweep clears cursors
through the adapter and is NEVER
written to Redis. Zero Redis writes
Presence is written only on join,
